title: Brian J. Enquist
body: Brian Joseph Enquist is an American biologist and academic whose research focuses on the development of quantitative and predictive frameworks for biology, ecology, and the biosphere. He is a professor of biology at the University of Arizona. and an external professor at the Santa Fe Institute. Enquist is known for his work on metabolic theory of ecology, functional ecology, and trait-based approaches in community and ecosystem ecology.
categories: Fellows of the Ecological Society of America
